name: Can I sue someone else besides my boss for work injury in Draper Utah?

mainEntity.name: Can I sue someone else besides my boss for work injury in Draper Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, third parties like equipment makers.[1][5]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, third-party negligence allows tort suits for full damages including pain/suffering.[1][5] Common for defective equipment or subcontractors.[5] Key factors: Prove duty/breach/causation; government claims need special notice.[1] Practical guidance: Workers' comp first, then sue third party separately; no double recovery offset. Attorney coordinates both.

description: Yes, third parties like equipment makers.[1][5]
